note: Stage-1.5 model-scaling (text), on the FROZEN Stage-1 config (chunk8192/msl4096/ti1/ep3/lr3e-4/r32-a64/attn-only/batch2). Sweeps model size on a fixed DEV data size (4M) — picking the headline model does NOT need the plateau size, that comes later in data-scaling. Qwen3 same-gen Base family so the qwen3-normalized data is shared (no re-normalize). Read BOTH static_rate and online_rate vs size: the story is how far online shifts the curve down (= online making a small model match a bigger static one), and the online delta likely NARROWS as the model grows (big base has less headroom). Headline model = best online_rate that is compute-feasible (decompress replays training, expensive at 8B) — not necessarily the largest. 8B is a separate memory-reduced grid (models_text_8b.json).
